Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced.notes: Partial rewrite of the game's DX12 post processing shaders to fix issues in tonemapping and the appearance of UI in HDR. Optional enhancements are also available.

CODE VEIN II.notes: ℹ️ Uses UE-Extended for HDR. RHI handles all file placement automatically. If the game has an in-game HDR option, enable that too.

Crisol: Theater of Idols.notes: ℹ️ Uses UE-Extended for HDR. RHI handles all file placement automatically. If the game has an in-game HDR option, enable that too.

Days Gone.notes: Must be using native res output and 100% res scale! HDR On in-game.

Directive 8020.notes: ℹ️ Uses UE-Extended for HDR. RHI handles all file placement automatically. If the game has an in-game HDR option, enable that too.

Cyberpunk 2077.notes:
⚠️ The RenoDX mod for Cyberpunk 2077 is a WIP. Always get the latest build directly from the RenoDX Discord — it is updated more frequently than any wiki download.

See Creepy's Cyberpunk RenoDX Guide for setup instructions:

Dishonored.notes:
ℹ️ This game has both 32-bit and 64-bit RenoDX builds.

• 64-bit (default) — for the Microsoft Store and Epic Games Store versions.
• 32-bit — for the Steam version. Enable 32-bit mode in 🎯 Overrides to use this.

Dragon Quest VII Reimagined.notes:
ℹ️ Optional: Enable HDR from Engine.ini with DQ7RFix. see below.
Add the following cvars to the DQ7RFix.ini.

r.AllowHDR=1
r.HDR.EnableHDROutput=1
r.HDR.Display.OutputDevice=5
r.HDR.Display.ColorGamut=2
r.HDR.UI.CompositeMode=1
r.HDR.UI.Level=1.5

The game has to be run in DX11 mode with '-dx11' argument.

If using the recommended Engine.ini route then you must also set the Processing Path to Engine HDR in the RenoDX tab of ReShade once in game.

This is reported to have the best result. SDR upgrade with DX11 and DX12 still works, but can exhibit UI/fog rendering problems.

DRAGON QUEST® XI S: Echoes of an Elusive.notes:
ℹ️ Optional: Enable HDR from Engine.ini. The SDR upgrade path might break some text box UIs.

r.AllowHDR=1
r.HDR.EnableHDROutput=1
r.HDR.Display.OutputDevice=5
r.HDR.Display.ColorGamut=2
r.HDR.UI.CompositeMode=1
r.HDR.UI.Level=1.5

Also support the original game. By default it uses Filmic Postprocess (Mobile).
Compatible with Luma DLSS/DLAA.

Dragon's Dogma 2.notes:
⚠️ RE Framework is required for ReShade and RenoDX in this title.

Install it from the RE Framework row above.

Echoes of the End: Enhanced Edition.notes: ℹ️ Uses UE-Extended for HDR. RHI handles all file placement automatically. If the game has an in-game HDR option, enable that too.

Gothic 1 Remake.notes:
ℹ️ Uses UE-Extended for HDR. RHI handles all file placement automatically. If the game has an in-game HDR option, enable that too.

⚠️ Turn off 'SDR EOTF Emulation' in RenoDX Settings.

Far Cry 2.notes:
⚠️ Far Cry 2 must run in DX10 for RenoDX to work.

More information available on Nexus:

Far Cry 3.notes:
⚠️ Far Cry 3 must run in DX11 for RenoDX to work.

More information available on Nexus:

Grand Theft Auto V Enhanced.notes: ℹ️ Change ReShade overlay button in ReShade.ini so it doesn't conflict with Rockstar overlay

L.A. Noire.notes:
⚠️ The RenoDX wiki mod for L.A. Noire is deprecated and does not work with recent ReShade versions.

To use RenoDX with this game you must enforce DX11, install ReShade with addon support v6.3.3, and use the older Nexus file version linked below.

Dying Light 2.notes: ⚠️ The RenoDX mod for Dying Light 2 has been abandoned and is no longer maintained. It may not work with current game or ReShade versions.

Grand Theft Auto: The Trilogy – The Defi.notes: ℹ️ Works with UE-Extended — upgrades SDR to HDR. Works out of the box, no additional configuration needed.

Grand Theft Auto III – The Definitive Ed.notes: ℹ️ Works with UE-Extended — upgrades SDR to HDR. Works out of the box, no additional configuration needed.

Grand Theft Auto: Vice City – The Defini.notes: ℹ️ Works with UE-Extended — upgrades SDR to HDR. Works out of the box, no additional configuration needed.

Grand Theft Auto: San Andreas – The Defi.notes: ℹ️ Works with UE-Extended — upgrades SDR to HDR. Works out of the box, no additional configuration needed.

High On Life 2.notes: ℹ️ Uses UE-Extended for HDR. RHI handles all file placement automatically. If the game has an in-game HDR option, enable that too.

Neverness to Everness.notes: ℹ️ RHI handles installation instructions automatically. Just click Install.

Max Payne 3.notes: ⚠️ The RenoDX mod for Max Payne 3 requires a separate Nexus mod to function. Download and follow the instructions on the Nexus page.

Monster Hunter Wilds.notes:
⚠️ RE Framework is required for ReShade and RenoDX in this title.

Install it from the RE Framework row above.

Nobody Wants to Die.notes: ℹ️ Uses UE-Extended for HDR. RHI handles all file placement automatically. If the game has an in-game HDR option, enable that too.

Of Ash and Steel.notes: ℹ️ Uses UE-Extended for HDR. RHI handles all file placement automatically. If the game has an in-game HDR option, enable that too.

REANIMAL.notes: REANIMAL has had native HDR added, developed by Pumbo

Street Fighter™ 6.notes:

Terraria.notes: ⚠️ Terraria requires admin privileges to install ReShade. RHI creates a symlink in the GAC directory, which needs elevated permissions. If the install fails, try running RHI as administrator.

Titan Quest II.notes: ⚠️ Native HDR requires the Ultra Plus mod (linked below). Game screen will go black while in inventory while using UE-Extended.

tModLoader.notes:
⚠️ You must run the game once in order to create the correct directories for ReShade/RenoDX to work.
After running the game once click Refresh and make sure directory is detected as /tModLoader/dotnet before installing anything

Download the borderless windowed mod for Metro 2033 Redux from the link below:

Metro: Last Light Redux.notesUrlLabel: Borderless mod for Metro Last Light Redux

FINAL FANTASY XIV Online.notes: ℹ️ DXVK provides significant CPU-bound performance improvements for FFXIV.

Max Payne 3.notes:
⚠️ ReShade 6.4.1 is required for RenoDX compatibility with this game. This has been automatically set in Overrides (RS Channel).

If you want to use a newer ReShade version, change the RS Channel in the Overrides panel — but RenoDX may not work correctly.

Monster Hunter Stories 2: Wings of Ruin.notes:
⚠️ This game shows a black screen with ReShade unless you install the MHS2Loader fix.

Download dinput8.dll and loader.dll from the link below and place them next to the game's exe.

Ryubing.notes:
⚠️ Ryubing requires Nightly ReShade loaded as Vulkan.

Set RS Channel to Nightly in Overrides. ReShade will be installed via the Vulkan layer automatically.

Borderlands 2.luma:
Requires dgVoodoo2 v2.81.3 or v2.87.3

Set these in dgVoodoo.conf:

[General]
OutputAPI : d3d11_fl11_0

[DirectX]
VideoCard : geforce_9800_gt
dgVoodooWatermark : false
VRAM : 1024

Borderlands: The Pre-Sequel.luma:
Requires dgVoodoo2 v2.81.3 or v2.87.3

Set these in dgVoodoo.conf:

[General]
OutputAPI : d3d11_fl11_0

[DirectX]
VideoCard : geforce_9800_gt
dgVoodooWatermark : false
VRAM : 1024

FINAL FANTASY VII REMAKE INTERGRADE.luma:
⚠ This game MUST be set to DX11 mode for Luma to work.

Add -dx11 to your Steam launch arguments:
Right-click game → Properties → Launch Options → type: -dx11

_comment_shaderPacks: === SHADER PACK OVERRIDES (add/disable/update packs without app update) ===

renodx-devkit.description: RenoDX development and debugging tools for shader authors

renodx-dlssfix.description: Makes ReShade draw on native game frames instead of generated frames. Also hides DLSS upscaling from ReShade.

renodx-upgrade.description: Enables inverse tone mapping (ITM) and resource upgrades for HDR in DX9+ games. Use with RenoFX HDR Toolkit shader for full HDR conversion. Not needed alongside RenoDX or Luma mods.
